case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOEL ANTONIO MOISES FRANCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOEL ANTONIO MOISES FRANNCO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 SERVED SEP-06-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCO, JOEL ANTONIO MOISES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $619.93 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCO, JOEL ANTONIO MOISES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANCO, JOEL ANTONIO MOISES $519.00 PRINCIPAL, $79.78 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $683.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
